states.label: Case created
states.description: Case has been opened. Awaiting initial assessment.

states.label: Awaiting evidence
states.description: Evidence has been requested from the applicant. Waiting for receipt.
required_actions: Issue reminder if evidence outstanding after 28 days
Escalate to team leader if evidence outstanding after 56 days

states.label: Under review
states.description: All required evidence has been received. Case is being assessed against policy.

states.label: Pending decision
states.description: Assessment complete. Decision drafted, awaiting sign-off if required.
required_actions: Obtain team leader sign-off if award increase exceeds £50 per week
Include mandatory reconsideration notice if reducing or ceasing benefit

states.label: Escalated
states.description: Case has been referred to a team leader due to complexity, deadline breach, or serious issue.
required_actions: Brief team leader on case history and reason for escalation
Await team leader instruction before taking further action

states.label: Closed
states.description: Decision has been made and communicated to the applicant.
required_actions: Notify applicant in writing within 5 working days

states.label: Case created
states.description: Application received. Initial eligibility check required.
required_actions: Check applicant meets basic eligibility criteria (POL-LA-001)
Acknowledge receipt to applicant within 5 working days

states.label: Awaiting evidence
required_actions: Issue reminder after 14 days if no response

states.label: Under review
states.description: All evidence received. Application under assessment. Consultation open if required.
required_actions: Verify all required documents are present and valid
Open 28-day public consultation for premises and event licences

states.label: Pending decision
required_actions: Refer to senior caseworker if two or more substantive objections received

states.label: Escalated
required_actions: Provide senior caseworker with full case summary

states.label: Case created
required_actions: Acknowledge referral or log scheduled check
Plan evidence request and any site visit

states.label: Awaiting evidence
required_actions: Arrange site visit if required (5 working days notice)

states.label: Under review
states.description: Documents received and under assessment. Site visit completed if applicable.
required_actions: Review all documentation against compliance requirements
Complete site visit record within 3 working days if applicable
Identify any breaches and classify as minor or serious

states.label: Pending decision
states.description: Assessment complete. Enforcement decision being prepared.
required_actions: Draft outcome letter — warning, requirement to remediate, or enforcement referral
Escalate to senior officer within 2 working days if serious breach identified

states.label: Escalated
states.description: Referred to senior officer — serious breach identified or complex case.
required_actions: Brief senior officer within 2 working days

states.label: Closed
required_actions: Schedule follow-up inspection if remediation was required
